name: antigravity-codex
description: Provides starter guidance and extension points for using Codex from Antigravity workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Codex from Antigravity-oriented agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: Starter plugin for connecting Antigravity workflows to Codex. It includes a skill entry point and placeholders for future MCP or app integration surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex to inspect this Antigravity workspace.
Draft a Codex task from my Antigravity context.
Help wire Codex into this Antigravity workflow.
